---
name: design
description: Use when turning approved requirements into a technical design, implementation roadmap, test strategy, interfaces, risks, non-functional safeguards, or legacy modernization plan for a hybrid Next.js and Python system.
---

# Design

Use this skill after requirements are clear enough to support architecture work.

Produce:

- design summary
- components and interfaces
- data flow
- implementation phases
- failure modes
- non-functional requirements
- test planning inputs
- explicit boundaries between Next.js surfaces and Python services or jobs
- current-state and target-state notes when modernizing legacy code

Do not design around missing requirements. Route ambiguity back to BA.
